notes: Converted from the old chapter extraction schema.
Hidden facts, motives, and faction pressures require living-world re-extraction.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed package describes an ongoing battle scene (方源 creating a killer move, 雪胡老祖 attacking, 紫山真君 protecting 影无邪). All events are publicly observable combat actions. No private knowledge, secret plans, future-known information, or directly supported knowledge gaps are present in the source pointers. The entities and events are all ambiguous-visibility combat occurrences with no hidden/secret content supported by the provided source quotes.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed primarily describes combat actions (attacks, defenses, retreats) and cultivation attempts. Characters' observed behaviors are visible (雪胡老祖攻击方源, 紫山真君撤离, 方源催动杀招), but the seed does not provide direct context about their underlying motives or goals. For example, 雪胡老祖 attacks but the seed doesn't reveal why he attacks; 紫山真君 retreats but the reason for retreat is not directly stated. Only surface-level conflict actions are recorded. Any inferred motive would be a psychological leap without direct source support.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

insufficient source-backed seed: The seed contains only individual actors (方源, 雪胡老祖, 影无邪, 紫山真君, 黑楼兰, 毛里球) with no named collective faction/group that has a concrete stake. While 影宗 (Shadow Sect) is mentioned in entity descriptions for 紫山真君 and 影无邪, the seed facts/events do not describe any collective stake, pressure, or interest for 影宗 as a group. The events focus on individual conflicts (方源 vs 雪胡老祖/毛里球) and 紫山真君's individual protection of 影无邪/黑楼兰. No faction-level pressure axis can be reliably extracted from this seed.
IF export filter quarantined 7 legacy old-schema branches.
